title: Clinical profile of Korean children with spina bifida: a single-center prospective cohort study.
author: Yun H Yang SH Lee H Kim SW Lee YS Ji Y Park J Ji JE Choi EK
content:
S-EPMC11613806 PMC11613806 Clinical profile of Korean children with spina bifida: a single-center prospective cohort study.

Background
